name: CMP Corporate PC Replacement Policy Survey
description: Survey instrument and results tracking corporate desktop and notebook replacement policies across U.S. IT buyers, comparing past policy against 'next 12 months' plans. Replacement interval bins: <18, 18-24, 24-30, 30-36, 36-42, 42-48, 48-54, >54 months, and 'when they break'. Instrument was fielded in partnership with CMP Media; this workbook contains the question framework and partial response tabulations that became inputs to Kastner's DCT corporate PC lifecycle commentary.
